projects.title: AI Traveler: Intelligent Travel Planning Platform
projects.description: Full-stack desktop application built with SpringBoot3, Spring AI, Electron, and React 18. Integrates LLM reasoning, PGVector retrieval, and multi-thread crawlers to provide an end-to-end AI service architecture from inspiration discovery to collaborative editing.

projects.title: Simple RAG: Personal Knowledge Base System
projects.description: Full-stack knowledge base based on LangGraph and FastAPI with an Agentic architecture. Employs hybrid recall and Small-to-Big hierarchical chunk retrieval strategies, supports RAGAS offline evaluation, and combined with Vue 3 for SSE streaming Q&A and visual knowledge management.
